description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by lush landscaping, including a variety of trees and shrubs in green, purple, and white hues. The house features a flat roof with a rooftop garden and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The structure is predominantly white, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic, complemented by wooden accents visible in the entryway and interior. The main entrance is set back, accessible via a pathway flanked by greenery, and the house appears to have an open-plan layout with visible interior partitions. The exterior is characterized by a seamless integration with the surrounding garden, creating a harmonious blend of architecture and nature. The landscaping is dense, providing privacy and a sense of seclusion for the residence.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and dense, colorful landscaping. The design emphasizes clean lines, natural light, and integration with lush gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a prominent rooftop garden surrounded by dense trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back garden, more trees, and the flat roof with visible interior partitions.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the lush landscaping wrapping around the house.
description_view_3: Side/rear view with dense foliage partially obscuring the house, emphasizing the integration with the garden and the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a wooden door, flanked by large windows and surrounded by dense landscaping, no visible porch or steps.
